source.crossCheck: Live Pump.fun holder feed, Solana Token-2022 account checks, and finalized Solscan transaction proof.
source.rule: Current non-dev holders with at least 0.5% PUMPR received a 1,000,000 PUMPR pool, weighted by holder percentage, holding time, prior rewards, and Pump.fun risk flags.

drops.title: PUMPR weighted holder airdrop

source.crossCheck: Live Solana Token-2022 holder accounts and finalized Solscan transaction proof.
source.rule: Current non-dev holders with at least 0.5% PUMPR were paid from a 1,000,000 PUMPR pool, weighted by holder percentage and holding time. Previous airdrops were considered so allocations stayed measured.

drops.summary: Paid current 0.5%+ holders from the live Pump.fun holder list. The 1M PUMPR pool was weighted by supply share, holding duration, and previous rewards so long-term holders received more while short-time holders received smaller test-sized drops.

drops.title: PUMPR 1%+ holder loyalty airdrop

source.crossCheck: Pump.fun list refreshed immediately before sending. First batch and all retry batches were verified by signature status polling.
source.rule: Current non-dev holders with at least 1% PUMPR and at least 3 hours holding time; longer holders received larger allocations.

drops.summary: Paid current 1%+ holders from the live Pump.fun holder list. 12h+ holders received 75K, 6h-12h received 50K, and 3h-6h received 25K.

drops.title: PUMPR loyal holder airdrop

source.crossCheck: Live Solana Token-2022 holder accounts and Solscan transaction proof
source.note: Pump.fun excludes the bonding curve from visible holder rank; on-chain rank includes it.

drops.summary: Paid launch-day holders who kept holding at least 1% through the live Solana cross-check.
